---
config:
  xyChart:
    showDataLabel: true
    xAxis:
      showLabel: false
---
xychart
  title Revenue
  x-axis [Q1, Q2, Q3]
  y-axis Users 0 --> 100
  bar [30, 60, 45]
  line [25, 55, 50]
---
                              Revenue
                         # Bar 1  - Line 1
